heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of early showers in the St. Lawrence Valley, showers otherwise likely, before diminishing from west to east, and ending in New Hampshire at around midnight. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40; some lower 30s in the Adirondacks. Patchy fog. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40; some lower 30s in the Adirondacks. Winds becoming variable to west around 5 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward, partly cloudy to the south. Chance of a shower near the Vermont/Québec border. Highs from the mid 50s to around 60, except low to mid 60s in southeastern valleys, and low to mid 50s far north. West winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Slight chance of an early shower in the far north, otherwise clearing. Lows in the low to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the Champlain Valley. West winds 5 to 10 mph early, then becoming light and variable.
